name: lorcan-claude-marketplace
description: Lorcan's personal Claude Code plugin marketplace

plugins.name: code-reviewer
plugins.description: Rigorous multi-agent code review for local branch changes or a GitHub PR. Confidence-ranked findings, no GitHub mutations.

plugins.name: simplify
plugins.description: Hub-and-spoke code simplifier for local code. User picks scope (branch diff, staged, working tree, or paths). Extracts functional + non-functional contract, dispatches specialised Sonnet spokes, validates, scores, then applies — or proposes only in plan mode.

plugins.name: pr-description
plugins.description: Generate a cohesive PR description and conventional-commits title from the raw diff vs base. Gathers git context, asks clarifying questions before writing, enforces a humanised prose style, and includes Mermaid diagrams where they add information.
